hyperedges.label: Bootstrap Sync Cycle (pull → apply → snapshot → commit/push)
Cross-Tool Doc Routing to CLAUDE.md
Context-Guard StatusLine/State-File Bridge
context-guard: writer + guard + reset coordinate via state file
graphify-guard defense in depth (detect helper + sessionstart + pretooluse)
fallow pipeline: skill -> report.py -> audit.py over Fallow tool
Parallel voltagent specialist review workflows
Principles reference + index + skill routing
RAIOX honesty pipeline: YAML config, code numbers, validate gate
visual live-sync pipeline: skill, daemon starter, daemon, gate hook
slides deck generation: skill, template, layout map, theme, fidelity check
ship test gate: skill flow, hooks config, enforcing hook script

nodes.label: grep -nIE em paths existentes; devolve linhas 'file:line:texto'.
nodes.norm_label: grep -nie em paths existentes; devolve linhas 'file:line:texto'.

nodes.label: grep -nE em arquivos específicos (não recursivo por extensão), ex package.json/R
nodes.norm_label: grep -ne em arquivos especificos (nao recursivo por extensao), ex package.json/r

nodes.label: Retorna lista de (tipo, prova) se houver QUALQUER uso. Vazia = sem evidência dir
nodes.norm_label: retorna lista de (tipo, prova) se houver qualquer uso. vazia = sem evidencia dir

nodes.label: Goal: repetir até 3 rodadas consecutivas idênticas. Cada rodada que muda     o r
nodes.norm_label: goal: repetir ate 3 rodadas consecutivas identicas. cada rodada que muda     o r

nodes.label: True se a ocorrência do símbolo está num comentário/prosa (// /* * <!-- #),
nodes.norm_label: true se a ocorrencia do simbolo esta num comentario/prosa (// /* * <!-- #),

nodes.label: ('externo', prova) se o símbolo é usado em OUTRO arquivo (FP do Fallow, ex.: imp
nodes.norm_label: ('externo', prova) se o simbolo e usado em outro arquivo (fp do fallow, ex.: imp

nodes.label: Roda um subcomando fallow --format json e devolve o dict, ou {} se falhar.
nodes.norm_label: roda um subcomando fallow --format json e devolve o dict, ou {} se falhar.

nodes.label: Roda audit.py (auditoria + goal de convergência) e devolve o dict de vereditos.
nodes.norm_label: roda audit.py (auditoria + goal de convergencia) e devolve o dict de vereditos.

nodes.label: path -> {verdict, reason, proof} a partir do JSON do audit.
nodes.norm_label: path -> {verdict, reason, proof} a partir do json do audit.

nodes.label: (path, name) -> verdict de export/tipo a partir do JSON do audit.
nodes.norm_label: (path, name) -> verdict de export/tipo a partir do json do audit.

nodes.label: Monta o item de export/tipo no bucket de código morto, usando o VEREDITO da audi
nodes.norm_label: monta o item de export/tipo no bucket de codigo morto, usando o veredito da audi

nodes.label: Caminho compacto pro summary: 2 últimos segmentos.
nodes.norm_label: caminho compacto pro summary: 2 ultimos segmentos.

nodes.label: liveness propagation from FP-root entry points
nodes.norm_label: liveness propagation from fp-root entry points

nodes.label: static analysis cannot see cron/route/dynamic/.svelte imports
nodes.norm_label: static analysis cannot see cron/route/dynamic/.svelte imports

nodes.label: ADR only when hard-to-reverse + surprising + real trade-off
nodes.norm_label: adr only when hard-to-reverse + surprising + real trade-off

nodes.label: Compaction loses reasoning chains; handoff preserves the why
nodes.norm_label: compaction loses reasoning chains; handoff preserves the why

nodes.label: Skill is generic; all app knowledge lives in the program file
nodes.norm_label: skill is generic; all app knowledge lives in the program file

nodes.label: Hard contract: verifiable result + binary verification
nodes.norm_label: hard contract: verifiable result + binary verification

nodes.label: ENV PROBLEM output classification (stop, don't spend iteration)
nodes.norm_label: env problem output classification (stop, don't spend iteration)

nodes.label: Reject LLM-as-judge/human inspection: subjective breaks autonomy
nodes.norm_label: reject llm-as-judge/human inspection: subjective breaks autonomy

nodes.label: Fault tolerance: circuit breaker, bulkhead, backpressure (category 4)
nodes.norm_label: fault tolerance: circuit breaker, bulkhead, backpressure (category 4)

nodes.label: Distributed systems: CAP, PACELC, saga, outbox (category 5)
nodes.norm_label: distributed systems: cap, pacelc, saga, outbox (category 5)

nodes.label: Evolution: versioning, schema evolution, safe migrations (category 7)
nodes.norm_label: evolution: versioning, schema evolution, safe migrations (category 7)

nodes.label: Skill applies principles (WHY+HOW), does not teach theory
nodes.norm_label: skill applies principles (why+how), does not teach theory

nodes.label: Index always-loaded, docs on-demand = context token savings
nodes.norm_label: index always-loaded, docs on-demand = context token savings

nodes.label: qa skill (4 parallel auditors vs plan)
nodes.norm_label: qa skill (4 parallel auditors vs plan)

nodes.label: Honesty Rule: numbers code-born, LLM only labels
nodes.norm_label: honesty rule: numbers code-born, llm only labels

nodes.label: Benchmark G13 (peer basket, DRAFT until validated)
nodes.norm_label: benchmark g13 (peer basket, draft until validated)

nodes.label: Replicate the QUESTION never the answer (Massini grade not a template)
nodes.norm_label: replicate the question never the answer (massini grade not a template)

nodes.label: golden rule: text is the author's, never invented
nodes.norm_label: golden rule: text is the author's, never invented

nodes.label: verdict lives inline on each item, never a second table
nodes.norm_label: verdict lives inline on each item, never a second table

nodes.label: live sync tail mode via local daemon (no copy/paste)
nodes.norm_label: live sync tail mode via local daemon (no copy/paste)
